svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:151.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/151.0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="p1c6VzZRCQT7bo49u8MN"> <mxGraphModel dx="902" dy="603" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title WearItRight - Use Case Diagram
left to right direction

skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam usecase {
 BackgroundColor #F8FAFC
 BorderColor #334155
 ArrowColor #334155
}
skinparam actor {
 BorderColor #0F172A
 BackgroundColor #E2E8F0
}

actor \"Visitor\" as Visitor
actor \"Registered User\" as User
actor \"Admin\" as Admin
actor \"Weather Data API\" as WeatherAPI
actor \"Shopping Provider APIs\" as ShopAPIs
actor \"Email Service\" as EmailService

rectangle \"WearItRight Web Application\" {

 package \"Account and Access\" {
 usecase \"Register Account\" as UC_Register
 usecase \"Log In\" as UC_Login
 usecase \"Log Out\" as UC_Logout
 usecase \"Reset Password\" as UC_ResetPassword
 usecase \"Send Password Reset Link\" as UC_SendResetLink
 usecase \"Authenticate User\" as UC_Authenticate
 usecase \"Authorize User Role\" as UC_Authorize
 usecase \"Delete Account and Personal Data\" as UC_DeleteAccount
 }

 package \"Profile and Preferences\" {
 usecase \"Manage Profile Preferences\" as UC_Profile
 usecase \"Manage Clothing Sizes\" as UC_Sizes
 usecase \"Manage Exclusion Preferences\" as UC_Exclusions
 usecase \"Save Outfit to Favorites\" as UC_SaveOutfit
 usecase \"Save Item to Favorites\" as UC_SaveItem
 usecase \"Manage Favorites\" as UC_ManageFavorites
 }

 package \"Context and Recommendation\" {
 usecase \"Provide Location\n(manual or geolocation)\" as UC_Location
 usecase \"Select Event Type and Dress Code\" as UC_EventContext
 usecase \"Retrieve Weather Context\" as UC_Weather
 usecase \"Generate Outfit Recommendations\" as UC_GenerateRecs
 usecase \"Rank Recommendations by Relevance\" as UC_Rank
 usecase \"Apply Weather Rules\n(layering and rain protection)\" as UC_WeatherRules
 usecase \"Apply User Exclusions\" as UC_ApplyExclusions
 usecase \"Explain Recommendation\n(weather and event fit)\" as UC_Explain
 usecase \"Provide Confidence Tips\" as UC_Confidence
 usecase \"Regenerate Recommendations\" as UC_Regenerate
 }

 package \"Shopping and Comparison\" {
 usecase \"Map Outfit Components\nto Purchasable Products\" as UC_MapProducts
 usecase \"Retrieve Product Price, Stock, and URL\" as UC_RetrieveProducts
 usecase \"Normalize Currency\" as UC_Currency
 usecase \"Identify Best Available Price\" as UC_BestPrice
 usecase \"Filter Products\" as UC_Filter
 usecase \"Sort Products\" as UC_Sort
 usecase \"Open Retailer Product Page\" as UC_OpenRetailer
 }

 package \"Experience, Reliability, and Operations\" {
 usecase \"Display Outfit Cards and Item Details\" as UC_Display
 usecase \"Show Loading, Errors, and Fallback Guidance\" as UC_Feedback
 usecase \"Support Responsive and Accessible UI\" as UC_UIQuality
 usecase \"Handle External API Failure Gracefully\" as UC_Resilience
 usecase \"Record Recommendation and Security Audit Logs\" as UC_Audit
 usecase \"Monitor Performance and API Health\" as UC_Monitor
 usecase \"Administer Roles and Access\" as UC_AdminAccess
 }
}

' Primary user interactions
Visitor -- UC_Register
Visitor -- UC_Login

User -- UC_Login
User -- UC_Logout
User -- UC_ResetPassword
User -- UC_Profile
User -- UC_Sizes
User -- UC_Exclusions
User -- UC_Location
User -- UC_EventContext
User -- UC_GenerateRecs
User -- UC_Regenerate
User -- UC_Display
User -- UC_Filter
User -- UC_Sort
User -- UC_OpenRetailer
User -- UC_SaveOutfit
User -- UC_SaveItem
User -- UC_ManageFavorites
User -- UC_DeleteAccount

Admin -- UC_AdminAccess
Admin -- UC_Audit
Admin -- UC_Monitor

' External systems
WeatherAPI -- UC_Weather
ShopAPIs -- UC_RetrieveProducts
EmailService -- UC_SendResetLink

' Includes and dependencies
UC_ResetPassword .> UC_SendResetLink : <<include>>
UC_Login .> UC_Authenticate : <<include>>
UC_Profile .> UC_Authorize : <<include>>
UC_ManageFavorites .> UC_Authorize : <<include>>
UC_DeleteAccount .> UC_Authorize : <<include>>
UC_AdminAccess .> UC_Authorize : <<include>>

UC_GenerateRecs .> UC_Weather : <<include>>
UC_GenerateRecs .> UC_Rank : <<include>>
UC_GenerateRecs .> UC_WeatherRules : <<include>>
UC_GenerateRecs .> UC_ApplyExclusions : <<include>>
UC_GenerateRecs .> UC_Explain : <<include>>
UC_GenerateRecs .> UC_Confidence : <<include>>
UC_Regenerate .> UC_GenerateRecs : <<include>>

UC_Display .> UC_MapProducts : <<include>>
UC_MapProducts .> UC_RetrieveProducts : <<include>>
UC_RetrieveProducts .> UC_Currency : <<include>>
UC_RetrieveProducts .> UC_BestPrice : <<include>>

UC_Filter .> UC_Display : <<extend>>
UC_Sort .> UC_Display : <<extend>>

UC_GenerateRecs .> UC_Feedback : <<include>>
UC_RetrieveProducts .> UC_Resilience : <<include>>
UC_GenerateRecs .> UC_Audit : <<include>>
UC_Login .> UC_Audit : <<include>>
UC_DeleteAccount .> UC_Audit : <<include>>

note bottom of UC_GenerateRecs
 Covers recommendation behavior requirements:
 context-aware generation, ranking, weather/event fit,
 exclusions, explainability, and confidence tips.
end note

note bottom of UC_RetrieveProducts
 Covers shopping requirements:
 multi-source price and stock retrieval,
 best-price identification, and product linking.
end note

note right of UC_UIQuality
 Covers UX quality requirements:
 responsive behavior across device sizes,
 keyboard accessibility, and readable contrast.
end note

note right of UC_Monitor
 Covers non-functional operations requirements:
 performance targets, availability, observability,
 and API health monitoring.
end note

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="CSTFSE6Sx-oJ1SF90R3_-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="3582" width="1069" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
